vocabulary.example: She persisted in her efforts to learn the new skill.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她堅持學習新技巧

vocabulary.example: The nuances of the language were difficult to understand.
vocabulary.example_translation: 語言的細微差別很難理解

vocabulary.example: The professor was known for her rigorous teaching style.
vocabulary.example_translation: 該教授以其嚴格的教學風格聞名

vocabulary.example: The sophisticated design of the building impressed me.
vocabulary.example_translation: 建築的精緻設計令我印象深刻

vocabulary.example: The professor demanded rigor in her students' work.
